top_signals.title: US Stocks Slip as Bank Earnings Start Before CPI: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks slipped as traders refrained from taking on risk on a busy day that kicked off with Wall Street earnings. Testimony from Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh and inflation data are due later.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran escalation weighs on bitcoin, stocks as oil climbs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SLB, Liberty Energy to Sell Power and Parts to Data Centers
top_signals.summary: SLB, the world’s largest oil field service provider, has agreed to partner with Liberty Energy Inc. to provide modular parts and power for data centers, the latest example of energy companies positioning themselves to benefit from the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK borrowing costs soar as Iran ceasefire collapses
top_signals.summary: The UK’s borrowing costs have sailed past five per cent for only the third time since the onset of the Iran war, in a headache for Andy Burnham just days before he enters Downing Street. The yield on the UK’s 10-year government bond – the benchmark for a country’s long-term ability to borrow – climbed [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
